scenarios.title: Multi-Agent Frameworks
scenarios.when_to_read: Tasks that build or troubleshoot CAMEL-AI agents, societies, workforces, model-backed workflows, tool-enabled agents, memory/RAG, or evaluation harnesses.
scenarios.role: Guides future agents through CAMEL-AI's practical repo workflows with self-contained routes for agents, models, tools, memory/RAG, and datagen/evaluation.
scenarios.read_when: User mentions CAMEL-AI, camel-ai, Python import camel, ChatAgent, RolePlaying, Workforce, ModelFactory, FunctionTool, MCPToolkit, CAMEL memory, CAMEL RAG, CAMEL benchmarks, or CAMEL datagen.
scenarios.best_for: Creating CAMEL agents and multi-agent systems; selecting provider backends; attaching toolkits/runtimes/services; building memory/RAG/data pipelines; planning datagen, verifier, environment, or benchmark workflows.
scenarios.avoid_when: The request is about an unrelated agent framework, pure OpenAI SDK usage without CAMEL, or implementing a new framework from scratch instead of using CAMEL-AI APIs.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `camel-ai` for repository-specific CAMEL-AI API, configuration, optional-extra, troubleshooting, and workflow routing; choose a generic Python or OpenAI SDK skill only when CAMEL is not part of the task.
